Policy Description: The SACN Salt and Health study attempts to present the scientific data that links high salt
intake to elevated blood pressure and cardiovascular diseases.
Suggestions for improving cardiovascular disease outcomes are given to NHS
commissioners and providers, as well as local authorities
It addresses lipid-lowering medications (such as statins) and lifestyle modifications
for both primary and secondary CVD prevention.
The primary means is evolutionising stroke care nationwide, help patients rebuild their

Policy Name: 10 Year Health plan England: Fit for the future
Policy Description: This is a strategy for developing a new, future-ready care model. It will be essential to
fulfilling health objective to give people true choice and control over their health and care.
For various clinical and public health indicators, including blood pressure and heart failure
the document specifies requirements and justifications while outlining guidelines for
personalised care adjustments and procedures for raising QOF queries.
The goal of the national cancer plan is to support the reformed NHS in providing some of
best cancer care available worldwide.
The strategy for organising our cancer efforts over the next five years is outlined in the PHE Cancer Board Plan
The plan serves to emphasise the importance of preserving  the strength of the health service while effectively
utilizing additional funding and addressing employee challenge.

Policy Name: 10 Year Cancer Plan: Call for evidence
Policy Description: The call for evidence aimed to inform an independent 10-year cancer plan for England, which has now been
incorportated into a major conditions plan.

Policy Description: To advance the fight against childhood and adolscent cancer, the government is bringing  together specialists in the field.
To improve public health and reduce secondhand smoke exposure, the Health Act of 2006 implemented strict smoke- free
regulations in the UK, banning smoking in enclosed public areas and workplaces.
The UK Government launched the Towards a Smokefree Generation Tobacco Plan for England 2017-2022 in july 2017
to advance its tobacco control efforts.
